---
title: "About"
---

## Profile

I work at the intersection of quantitative finance, macroeconometrics, banking analytics, data science, and research software engineering.

My professional focus is to transform analytical work into reproducible, documented, and maintainable systems.

## Technical stack

- **R**: econometrics, reporting, visualization, packages, Quarto.
- **Python**: automation, machine learning, pipelines, APIs.
- **SQL**: structured data extraction and database integration.
- **C++ / Rcpp**: computational finance, simulation, acceleration.
- **Git/GitHub**: version control, collaboration, CI/CD, public technical portfolio.

## Research orientation

I prioritize data-driven decision-making, rigorous empirical design, and technical implementation that can be audited, reproduced, and extended.
